Product Creation Code – Outline
Course outline
Here is a brief outline of the core video lessons for the “Product Creation Code” Course.
I would recommend printing this out and checking off the lessons as you complete them. Since
this is a “work at your own pace” program, it can be easy to lose track of where you left off.
This outline will help you stay on task. Enjoy the course!
GETTING STARTED
¨ Lesson 1: Introduction
PHASE ONE: PRODUCT CREATION FOUNDATIONS
¨ Lesson 2: The Magic Formula for Success
¨ Lesson 3: What’s Your Perfect Day?
¨ Lesson 4: The Secrets to Creating a Killer Product
¨ Lesson 5: How to “Move the Free Line”
¨ Lesson 6: Know Your Math
¨ Lesson 7: Perception is Everything
o 	Case Study #1: How to Take Care of Your Pets
o 	Case Study #2: “SR Secrets” Stock Trading Course
PHASE TWO: PRODUCT CREATION STRATEGY
¨ Lesson 8: How to Select Your Niche
¨ Lesson 9: Secrets to Finding a Rabid Market
¨ Lesson 10: “Be the Wizard, Beware the Wizard”
